text:
> >Description:
> 
> 	switch (x) {
> 	case ...
> 	...
> 	deafult: ...	/* no error reported, but fails	*/
> 	}
> 
> 	if deafult is the alias to default, it should make it work,
> 	otherwise, please generate error code, and fail for .o .
> 
'deafult:' is a label. It can be used in 'goto' statement.

Dima
